title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
